name: predicte-commit
description: Automatically generate git commit messages using AI for FREE following conventional commits guidelines. Powered by Mistral AI or Local LLMs (Ollama, vLLM, LMstudio)

commands.title: Predicte Commit: Set OpenAI Compatible API_KEY
Predicte Commit: Set OpenAI Compatible API_BASE_URL

predicteCommit.models.description: List of models to use for the active provider. If empty, the provider's defaults are used.

predicteCommit.ignoredFiles.description: Glob patterns (repo-relative) to exclude from staged diff context

predicteCommit.systemPrompt.default:
You are an expert developer.

Task: Write a concise git commit message for the provided code diff.

Rules:
1. Output MUST be a single commit message.
2. First line MUST be exactly one Conventional Commits subject line (e.g., 'feat: add user login').
3. The subject line must be under 50 characters and summarize the ENTIRE change set.
4. Do NOT output multiple subject lines (no multiple 'type:' headers).
5. If needed, add a blank line and then a bulleted body using '- ' bullets.
6. Do NOT output markdown code blocks or fences. Output ONLY raw commit message text.
7. Choose the commit type based on the overall change set. Use 'docs:' only when ALL changes are documentation-only; if the changes include code/config/deps, prefer 'chore:' or 'refactor:' as appropriate.
8. The subject should summarize the whole set and mention the most significant non-doc change if present.
9. If the diff is empty or trivial, reply with a short error message.
predicteCommit.systemPrompt.markdownDescription: System prompt used to generate commit messages. You can customize it in VS Code settings.

predicteCommit.openaiBaseUrl.description: API_BASE_URL for an OpenAI compatible API, for example https://api.openai.com/v1 or https://your-provider.example/v1.

predicteCommit.openaiModel.description: Fallback model for the OpenAI compatible provider. If predicteCommit.models is set, that list is used instead.

predicteCommit.useLocal.description: Use a local provider (Ollama, vLLM, LM Studio) instead of Mistral cloud

predicteCommit.localProvider.description: Local provider to use when Use Local is enabled.

predicteCommit.localBaseUrl.description: Base URL for local provider. Leave empty to use the provider's default (Ollama: :11434, vLLM: :8000, LM Studio: :1234).

predicteCommit.localModel.description: Model name for local provider. Leave empty to assume default.

predicteCommit.debugLogging.description: Log prompt payload and ignore-filter diagnostics to the Predicte Commit output channel

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:unit: npm run compile-tests && npx mocha out/test/unit/**/*.test.js --ui tdd
